creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
jmz@FreeBSD.org schrieb:,

> The port does not compile here:
> gmake ispell/de_DE.aff ispell/de_DE.hash
> gmake: *** virtual memory exhausted.  Stop.
> *** Error code 2
> 
> what version of gmake are you using?

I used gmake-3.81_2

I have no problems to compile it.
Tested on FreeBSD 6.3 in clean jail
Tested on FreeBSD 6.3 on desktop
Tested on FreeBSD 7.0 in clean jail

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
http://people.freebsd.org/~dinoex/errorlogs/
